title: Search bar functionality
test_steps: Click on the search bar. | Type 'Los Angeles' into the search bar. | Press enter to execute the search.
expected_result: The screen should display curated recommendations for Los Angeles.

title: Navigating between tabs
test_steps: Click on the 'FOR YOU' tab. | Click on the 'HOMES' tab. | Click on the 'EXPERIENCES' tab. | Click on the 'PLACES' tab.
expected_result: The screen should display the respective content for each tab.

title: Navigating to 'See all >' link
test_steps: Click on the 'See all >' link under the 'Los Angeles' section.
expected_result: The screen should navigate to a page displaying all recommendations for Los Angeles.

title: Clicking on a recommendation
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the details page for the 'UNIQUE BOUTIQUES' recommendation.

title: Turning on filters
test_steps: Click on the section prompting to turn on filters for better recommendations.
expected_result: The screen should display filter options to refine recommendations.

title: Footer navigation
test_steps: Click on the 'EXPLORE' icon in the footer. | Click on the 'SAVED' icon in the footer. | Click on the 'TRIPS' icon in the footer.
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the respective sections in the footer.

title: Search bar with invalid input
test_steps: Click on the search bar. | Type 'invalid input' into the search bar. | Press enter to execute the search.
expected_result: The screen should display an error message indicating invalid input.

title: Clicking on a non-existent recommendation
test_steps: Click on a recommendation that does not exist.
expected_result: The screen should display an error message indicating the recommendation does not exist.

title: Navigating to a non-existent section
test_steps: Click on a section that does not exist.
expected_result: The screen should display an error message indicating the section does not exist.
